THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, MICHELLE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 640 FELL #A $766.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $766.00, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT WAIVES SECURITY DEPOSIT.
